race.comment: ATOMIC SELFIE (2) returned from a spell three weeks ago when she was beaten 5.5 lengths into fifth over 1200m at Gold Coast. Strips fitter and can take this out. GOLD MELODY (12) is yet to fill a placing in two runs since resuming from a spell, the latest when ninth over 1300m at Taree. Has further improvement to come and is sure to be about the mark. JUST ONE LOOK (6) stuck on well last start to finish third over 1200m at Tamworth after showing good early speed. Likely improver with strong prospects. RIVOLI STAR (8) was safely held when thirteenth over 1400m at Taree at his latest appearance. Best efforts measure up and worth another chance.
